params.SpellDescription: Conjure a card of your choice from the Planets spellbook onto the battlefield tapped with eight charge counters on it. Activate only as a sorcery.
params.Spellbook: Adagia; Windswept Bastion,Evendo; Waking Haven,Kavaron; Memorial World,Susur Secundi; Void Altar,Uthros; Titanic Godcore

remaining_params.SpellDescription: Conjure a card of your choice from the Planets spellbook onto the battlefield tapped with eight charge counters on it. Activate only as a sorcery.

params.TriggerDescription: When this enchantment enters, if you control a Planet, this enchantment deals 4 damage to any target.
